```{r}
        NA_real_,
        .
      )
    )
  )

# sanity check
pr_pd_by_sex_cc %>%
  filter( is.na( estimate ) )
summary( pr_pd_by_sex_cc )

# sex-stratified prevalence ratio and prevalence difference analyses for register-based mental health outcomes, including anxiolytic use, depression, anxiety, and stress-related disorders, were not presented because of sparse data and highly imprecise estimates in some subgroups
```

###### 3.2.2.2. Antidepressant use
```{r}
pr_pd_by_sex_cc %>% 
  filter( outcome %in% c( "antidepressant" ),
          estimate_type == "Prevalence Difference",
          sample_type == "individual" ) %>%
  summary()

pr_pd_by_sex_cc %>% 
  filter( outcome %in% c( "antidepressant" ),
          estimate_type == "Prevalence Ratio",
          sample_type == "individual" ) %>%
  summary()

plot_data <- pr_pd_by_sex_cc %>% 
  filter( outcome %in% c( "antidepressant" ) )

p_pr_pd_by_sex <- ggplot(
  plot_data,
  
  aes( x = year, y = estimate, color = exposure_model, linetype = sample_type, group = interaction( exposure_model, sample_type ) ) ) +
  
  geom_errorbar( data = plot_data %>%
                   filter( sample_type == "individual" ),
                 aes( ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci ), width = diff( range( 2006, 2021 ) ) * 0.025 ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) + 
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  geom_hline( data = data.frame( estimate_type = "Prevalence Ratio" ),
              aes( yintercept = 1 ),
              linetype = "dashed",
              color = "grey40" ) +
  
  geom_hline( data = data.frame( estimate_type = "Prevalence Difference" ),
              aes( yintercept = 0 ),
              linetype = "dashed",
              color = "grey40" ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous( breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, 3 ),
                      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.03 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_color_manual( values = c(
    "Bisexual_Adjusted"   = "#C77CFF",
    "Bisexual_Crude"      = lighten( "#C77CFF", 0.4 ),
    "Homosexual_Adjusted" = "#00BFC4",
    "Homosexual_Crude"    = lighten( "#00BFC4", 0.4 ) ),
    
    labels = c(
      "Bisexual_Adjusted"   = "Bisexual (Adjusted)",
      "Bisexual_Crude"      = "Bisexual (Crude)",
      "Homosexual_Adjusted" = "Homosexual (Adjusted)",
      "Homosexual_Crude"    = "Homosexual (Crude)" ),
    
    guide = guide_legend( nrow = 2 ) ) +
  
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c(
      "pooled" = "dotted",
      "individual" = "solid" ),
    
    labels = c(
      "pooled" = "Year-Specific Cross-Sectional Analyses",
      "individual" = "Individual Survey Analyses" ),
    
    guide = guide_legend( nrow = 2 ) ) +
  
  labs( x = "Survey/Calendar Year",
        y = "Association Estimate of Antidepressant Use (95% CI)",
        color = NULL,
        linetype = NULL ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 1.5, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "bottom" ) +
  
  facet_grid( estimate_type ~ sex,
              switch = "y",
              scales = "free" ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( 
    y = list(
      estimate_type == "Prevalence Ratio" ~ 
        scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 18 ),
                            breaks = c( seq( 0, 18, 3 ) ),
                            expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0 ) ) ),
      
      estimate_type == "Prevalence Difference" ~ 
        scale_y_continuous( limits = c( -0.1, 0.3 ),
                            breaks = c( seq( -0.1, 0.3, 0.1 ) ),
                            labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                            expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_pr_pd_by_sex
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_pr_pd_antidepressant_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_pr_pd_by_sex, width = 9, height = 7.5 )
```

### 4. Year-Specific Cohort Analyses
#### 4.1. Annual prevalence
##### 4.1.1. By sexual identity
###### 4.1.1.1. Prepare data
```{r}
ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc <- read_xlsx( here( "results_output/results_cc/ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc.xlsx" ) )
summary( ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc )
unique( ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc$sexual_identity_baseline )

plot_co_data_cc <- ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc %>%
  filter(
    sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
    ) %>%
  mutate(
    sexual_identity_baseline = factor(
      sexual_identity_baseline,
      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
      ),
    outcome = as.factor( outcome )
    )

summary( plot_co_data_cc )

vline_data <- data.frame(
  year = 2009, # May 1, 2009
  label = "Marriage Equality",
  sexual_identity_baseline = factor( c( "Bisexual", "Homosexual" ),
                                     levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Bisexual", "Homosexual" ) ) )

# vline_data_covid <- data.frame(
#   year = 2020, # March 2020
#   label = "COVID-19 Outbreak",
#   sexual_identity_baseline = factor( c( "Heterosexual" ),
#                                      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Bisexual", "Homosexual" ) ) )
```

###### 4.1.1.2. Antidepressant use
```{r}
plot_co_data_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use",
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.3 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.3, by = 0.05 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Antidepressant Use" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' ) 
# +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.15, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

# p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.15, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_antidepressant_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

###### 4.1.1.3. Anxiolytic use
```{r}
plot_co_data_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use",
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.15 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.15, by = 0.05 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Anxiolytic Use" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' ) 
# +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.06, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

# p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.06, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_anxiolytic_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

###### 4.1.1.4. Depression
```{r}
plot_co_data_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "depression" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "depression",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
    
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.10 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.10, by = 0.02 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Depression" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' ) 
# +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.03, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

# p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.03, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_depression_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

###### 4.1.1.5. Anxiety disorders
```{r}
plot_co_data_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiety" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "anxiety",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
    
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.15 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.15, by = 0.05 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Anxiety Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' ) 
# +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.05, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

# p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.05, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_anxiety_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

###### 4.1.1.6. Stress-related disorders
```{r}
plot_co_data_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "stress_related" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "stress_related",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
    
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.1 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.1, by = 0.02 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Stress-Related Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' ) 
# +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.01, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

# p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
#   
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data_covid,
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.01, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_stress_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

##### 4.1.2. By sex
###### 4.1.2.1. Prepare data
```{r}
ann_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc <- read_xlsx( here( "results_output/results_cc/ann_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc.xlsx" ) )
summary( ann_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc )
unique( ann_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc$sexual_identity_baseline )

plot_co_data_by_sex_cc <- ann_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc %>%
  filter(
    sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
    ) %>%
  mutate(
    sexual_identity_baseline = factor(
      sexual_identity_baseline,
      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
      ),
    sex = as.factor( sex ),
    outcome = as.factor( outcome )
    )

summary( plot_co_data_by_sex_cc )

# vline_data <- data.frame(
#   year = 2009, # May 1, 2009
#   label = "Marriage Equality",
#   sexual_identity_baseline = factor( c( "Bisexual", "Homosexual" ),
#                                      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Bisexual", "Homosexual" ) ) )

# vline_data_covid <- data.frame(
#   year = 2020, # March 2020
#   label = "COVID-19 Outbreak",
#   sexual_identity_baseline = factor( c( "Heterosexual" ),
#                                      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Bisexual", "Homosexual" ) ) )
```

###### 4.1.2.2. Antidepressant use
```{r}
plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use",
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.35 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.35, by = 0.05 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Antidepressant Use" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = 0.15, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

# p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
# 
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data_covid %>%
#       mutate( sex = "Male" ),
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data_covid %>%
#       mutate( sex = "Male" ),
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.15, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_antidepressant_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.1.2.3. Anxiolytic use
```{r}
plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use",
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.15 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.15, by = 0.05 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Anxiolytic Use" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = 0.06, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

# p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
# 
#   geom_vline(
#     data = vline_data_covid %>%
#       mutate( sex = "Male" ),
#     aes( xintercept = year ),
#     linetype = "dashed",
#     color = "grey20",
#     linewidth = 0.4 ) +
#   
#   geom_text(
#     data = vline_data_covid %>%
#       mutate( sex = "Male" ),
#     aes( x = year, y = 0.06, label = label ),
#     angle = 90,
#     nudge_x = -0.7,
#     nudge_y = 0.05,
#     size = 11 / .pt,
#     family = "Arial",
#     color = "grey20",
#     inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_anxiolytic_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.1.2.4. Depression
```{r}
plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "depression" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "depression",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.15 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.15, by = 0.05 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Depression" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = 0.03, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_depression_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.1.2.5. Anxiety disorders
```{r}
plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiety" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "anxiety",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.15 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.15, by = 0.05 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Anxiety Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  # 
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = 0.03, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_anxiety_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.1.2.6. Stress-related disorders
```{r}
plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
  filter( outcome == "stress_related" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_data_by_sex_cc %>%
    filter( outcome == "stress_related",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.15 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.15, by = 0.05 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Annual Prevalence of Stress-Related Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( sex = "Male" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = 0.03, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_prevalence_poo_co_stress_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

#### 4.2. Cumulative prevalence
##### 4.2.1. By sexual identity
###### 4.2.1.1. Prepare data
```{r}
cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc <- read_xlsx( here( "results_output/results_cc/cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc.xlsx" ) )
summary( cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc )
unique( cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc$sexual_identity_baseline )

plot_co_cum_prevalence <- cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc %>%
  filter(
    sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
    ) %>%
  mutate(
    sexual_identity_baseline = factor(
      sexual_identity_baseline,
      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
      ),
    outcome = as.factor( outcome )
    )

summary( plot_co_cum_prevalence )
```

###### 4.2.1.2. Antidepressant use
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use",
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.6 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.6, by = 0.1 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Antidepressant Use" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_antidepressant_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

###### 4.2.1.3. Anxiolytic use
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use",
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.5 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.5, by = 0.1 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Anxiolytic Use" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_anxiolytic_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

###### 4.2.1.4. Depression
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "depression" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome == "depression",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.4, by = 0.1 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Depression" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_depression_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

###### 4.2.1.5. Anxiety disorders
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiety" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome == "anxiety",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.4, by = 0.1 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Anxiety Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_anxiety_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

###### 4.2.1.6. Stress-related disorders
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "stress_related" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome == "stress_related",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.35 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.35, by = 0.05 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Stress-Related Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ sexual_identity_baseline ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_stress_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 6 )
```

##### 4.2.2. By sex
###### 4.2.2.1. Prepare data
```{r}
cum_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc <- read_xlsx( here( "results_output/results_cc/cum_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc.xlsx" ) )
summary( cum_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc )
unique( cum_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc$sexual_identity_baseline )

plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex <- cum_prevalence_poo_co_by_sex_cc %>%
  filter(
    sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
    ) %>%
  mutate(
    sexual_identity_baseline = factor(
      sexual_identity_baseline,
      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
      ),
    sex = as.factor( sex ),
    outcome = as.factor( outcome )
    )

summary( plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex )
```

###### 4.2.2.2. Antidepressant use
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
  filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
    filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use",
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.6 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.6, by = 0.1 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Antidepressant Use" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_antidepressant_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.2.2.3. Anxiolytic use
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
    filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use",
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.5 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.5, by = 0.1 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Anxiolytic Use" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_anxiolytic_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.2.2.4. Depression
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
  filter( outcome == "depression" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
    filter( outcome == "depression",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.4, by = 0.1 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Depression" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_depression_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.2.2.5. Anxiety disorders
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiety" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
    filter( outcome == "anxiety",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.4, by = 0.1 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Anxiety Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_anxiety_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.2.2.6. Stress-related disorders
```{r}
plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
  filter( outcome == "stress_related" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
    filter( outcome == "stress_related",
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  aes( x = cum_year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous( 
    limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
    breaks = seq( 0, 0.4, by = 0.1 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ),
    labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence of Stress-Related Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_grid( sex ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y" ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )
  
p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_stress_by_sex_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.2.2.7. The 2006 cohort
```{r}
plot_cum_by_sex_2006 <- plot_co_cum_prevalence_by_sex %>%
  filter( cohort_year == 2006 ) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = factor(
      outcome,
      levels = c(
        "depression", "anxiety", "stress_related",
        "antidepressant_use", "anxiolytic_use"
        ),
      labels = c(
        "Depression", "Anxiety Disorders", "Stress-Related Disorders",
        "Antidepressant Use", "Anxiolytic Use"
        )
      )
    )

summary( plot_cum_by_sex_2006 )

# diagnosis
plot_cum_diag <- plot_cum_by_sex_2006 %>%
  filter( outcome %in% c(
    "Depression",
    "Anxiety Disorders",
    "Stress-Related Disorders"
    ) )

plot_cum_diag %>%
  group_by( outcome ) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min( point_estimate ),
    max = max( point_estimate )
  )

p_cum_diag_by_sex <- ggplot(
  plot_cum_diag,
  
  aes(
    x = cum_year,
    y = point_estimate,
    color = sexual_identity_baseline,
    group = sexual_identity_baseline
    )
  ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_color_manual( 
    values = c(
      "Heterosexual" = "#F8766D",
      "Homosexual"   = "#00BFC4",
      "Bisexual"     = "#C77CFF" 
      ) 
    ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( seq( 2006, 2015, by = 3 ), 2019 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) )
    ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence",
    color = NULL
    ) +
  
  facet_grid(
    outcome ~ sex,
    scales = "free_y",
    switch = "y"
    ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    outcome == "Depression" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.4, 0.1 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ),
    
    outcome == "Anxiety Disorders" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.4, 0.1 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ),
    
    outcome == "Stress-Related Disorders" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.4, 0.1 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "bottom" ) +
  
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_cum_diag_by_sex
ggsave(
  "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_diag_2006_by_sex_cc.svg",
  plot = p_cum_diag_by_sex,
  width = 8,
  height = 8 
  )


# medication
plot_cum_med <- plot_cum_by_sex_2006 %>%
  filter( outcome %in% c(
    "Antidepressant Use", 
    "Anxiolytic Use"
  ) )

plot_cum_med %>%
  group_by( outcome ) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min( point_estimate ),
    max = max( point_estimate )
  )

p_cum_med_by_sex <- ggplot(
  plot_cum_med,
  
  aes(
    x = cum_year,
    y = point_estimate,
    color = sexual_identity_baseline,
    group = sexual_identity_baseline
  )
) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_color_manual( 
    values = c(
      "Heterosexual" = "#F8766D",
      "Homosexual"   = "#00BFC4",
      "Bisexual"     = "#C77CFF" 
    ) 
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ) ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) )
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Cumulative Prevalence",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  
  facet_grid(
    outcome ~ sex,
    scales = "free_y",
    switch = "y"
  ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    outcome == "Antidepressant Use" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.6 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.6, 0.15 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ),
    
    outcome == "Anxiolytic Use" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.5 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.5, 0.1 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "bottom" ) +
  
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )

p_cum_med_by_sex
ggsave(
  "results_output/plots_cc/p_cum_prevalence_poo_co_med_2006_by_sex_cc.svg",
  plot = p_cum_med_by_sex,
  width = 8,
  height = 5.7
)
```

#### 4.3. Annual and cumulative prevalence
##### 4.3.1. By sexual identity
###### 4.3.1.1. Prepare data
```{r}
# annual prevalence
ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc <- read_xlsx( here( "results_output/results_cc/ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc.xlsx" ) )
summary( ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc )
unique( ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc$sexual_identity_baseline )

plot_co_data_cc <- ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc %>%
  filter(
    sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
    ) %>%
  mutate(
    sexual_identity_baseline = factor(
      sexual_identity_baseline,
      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
      ),
    outcome = as.factor( outcome )
    )

summary( plot_co_data_cc )

# cumulative prevalence
cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc <- read_xlsx( here( "results_output/results_cc/cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc.xlsx" ) )
summary( cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc )
unique( cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc$sexual_identity_baseline )

plot_co_cum_prevalence <- cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc %>%
  filter(
    sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
    ) %>%
  mutate(
    sexual_identity_baseline = factor(
      sexual_identity_baseline,
      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
      ),
    outcome = as.factor( outcome )
    )

summary( plot_co_cum_prevalence )

# merge data
plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence <- bind_rows(
  plot_co_data_cc %>%
    mutate( type = "annual" ),
  
  plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
    rename( year = cum_year ) %>%
    mutate( type = "cumulative" )
  ) %>%
  mutate( type = as.factor( type ) )

summary( plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence )

# vline_data <- data.frame(
#   year = 2009, # May 1, 2009
#   label = "Marriage Equality",
#   sexual_identity_baseline = factor( c( "Bisexual", "Homosexual" ),
#                                      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Bisexual", "Homosexual" ) ) )


# double check whether first-year annual and cumulative prevalence is exactly the same
plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use" ) %>%
  filter(
    year == if_else( cohort_year <= 2006, 2006, cohort_year ) 
    ) %>%
  select(
    cohort_year,
    year,
    sexual_identity_baseline,
    type,
    point_estimate,
    lower_ci,
    upper_ci
    ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = c( point_estimate, lower_ci, upper_ci )
    ) %>%
  mutate(
    identical_all =
      point_estimate_annual == point_estimate_cumulative &
      lower_ci_annual == lower_ci_cumulative &
      upper_ci_annual == upper_ci_cumulative
    ) %>%
  count( identical_all )
```

###### 4.3.1.2. Antidepressant use
```{r}
plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use",
          type == "annual" ) %>%
  summary()

plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "antidepressant_use",
          type == "cumulative" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome %in% c( "antidepressant_use" ),
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Prevalence of Antidepressant Use" ) +
  
  facet_grid( type ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y",
              scales = "free_y",
              labeller = labeller(
                type = c(
                  "annual" = "Annual",
                  "cumulative" = "Cumulative" ) ) ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    type == "annual" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.3 ),
                                           breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.3, 0.1 ) ),
                                           labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                           expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ) ),
    
    type == "cumulative" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.6 ),
                                               breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.6, 0.1 ) ),
                                               labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                               expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )

p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = 0.17, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_cum_prevalence_poo_co_antidepressant_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.3.1.3. Anxiolytic use
```{r}
plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use",
          type == "annual" ) %>%
  summary()

plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiolytic_use",
          type == "cumulative" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome %in% c( "anxiolytic_use" ),
            cohort_year >= 2006 ),
  
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( 2007, 2013, 2020 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Prevalence of Anxiolytic Use" ) +
  
  facet_grid( type ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y",
              scales = "free_y",
              labeller = labeller(
                type = c(
                  "annual" = "Annual",
                  "cumulative" = "Cumulative" ) ) ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    type == "annual" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.15 ),
                                           breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.15, 0.05 ) ),
                                           labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                           expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ) ),
    
    type == "cumulative" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.5 ),
                                               breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.5, 0.1 ) ),
                                               labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                               expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )

p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = 0.06, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_cum_prevalence_poo_co_anxiolytic_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.3.1.4. Depression
```{r}
plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "depression",
          type == "annual" ) %>%
  summary()

plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "depression",
          type == "cumulative" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome %in% c( "depression" ),
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Prevalence of Depression" ) +
  
  facet_grid( type ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y",
              scales = "free_y",
              labeller = labeller(
                type = c(
                  "annual" = "Annual",
                  "cumulative" = "Cumulative" ) ) ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    type == "annual" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.1 ),
                                           breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.1, 0.02 ) ),
                                           labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                           expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ) ),
    
    type == "cumulative" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
                                               breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.4, 0.1 ) ),
                                               labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                               expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )

p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = -0.033, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_cum_prevalence_poo_co_depression_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.3.1.5. Anxiety disorders
```{r}
plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiety",
          type == "annual" ) %>%
  summary()

plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "anxiety",
          type == "cumulative" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome %in% c( "anxiety" ),
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Prevalence of Anxiety Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_grid( type ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y",
              scales = "free_y",
              labeller = labeller(
                type = c(
                  "annual" = "Annual",
                  "cumulative" = "Cumulative" ) ) ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    type == "annual" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.15 ),
                                           breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.15, 0.05 ) ),
                                           labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                           expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ) ),
    
    type == "cumulative" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
                                               breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.4, 0.1 ) ),
                                               labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                               expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )

p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = 0.05, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_cum_prevalence_poo_co_anxiety_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

###### 4.3.1.6. Stress-related disorders
```{r}
plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "stress_related",
          type == "annual" ) %>%
  summary()

plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( outcome == "stress_related",
          type == "cumulative" ) %>%
  summary()

p_prevalence <- ggplot( 
  plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
    filter( outcome %in% c( "stress_related" ),
            cohort_year >= 2003 ),
  
  aes( x = year, y = point_estimate, color = cohort_year, group = cohort_year ) ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = seq( 2003, 2019, by = 4 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.05 ) ) ) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = colorRampPalette( viridis::viridis( 21, option = "turbo" )[ 3:20 ] )( 100 ),
    name = "Cohort Year",
    limits = c( 2003, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( 2004, 2011, 2018 ) ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Prevalence of Stress-Related Disorders" ) +
  
  facet_grid( type ~ sexual_identity_baseline,
              switch = "y",
              scales = "free_y",
              labeller = labeller(
                type = c(
                  "annual" = "Annual",
                  "cumulative" = "Cumulative" ) ) ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    type == "annual" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.1 ),
                                           breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.1, 0.02 ) ),
                                           labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                           expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.01 ) ) ),
    
    type == "cumulative" ~ scale_y_continuous( limits = c( 0, 0.3 ),
                                               breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.3, 0.1 ) ),
                                               labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
                                               expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "right" )

p_prevalence <- p_prevalence +
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' )
  
  # geom_vline(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( xintercept = year ),
  #   linetype = "dashed",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   linewidth = 0.4 ) +
  # 
  # geom_text(
  #   data = vline_data %>%
  #     mutate( type = "annual" ),
  #   aes( x = year, y = 0.01, label = label ),
  #   angle = 90,
  #   nudge_x = -0.7,
  #   nudge_y = 0.05,
  #   size = 11 / .pt,
  #   family = "Arial",
  #   color = "grey20",
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE )

p_prevalence
ggsave( "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_cum_prevalence_poo_co_stress_cc.svg", plot = p_prevalence, width = 14, height = 7 )
```

##### 4.3.2. The 2006 cohort
###### 4.3.2.1. Prepare data
```{r}
# annual prevalence
ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc <- read_xlsx( here( "results_output/results_cc/ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc.xlsx" ) )
summary( ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc )
unique( ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc$sexual_identity_baseline )

plot_co_data_cc <- ann_prevalence_poo_co_cc %>%
  filter(
    sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
    ) %>%
  mutate(
    sexual_identity_baseline = factor(
      sexual_identity_baseline,
      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
      ),
    outcome = as.factor( outcome )
    )

summary( plot_co_data_cc )

# cumulative prevalence
cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc <- read_xlsx( here( "results_output/results_cc/cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc.xlsx" ) )
summary( cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc )
unique( cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc$sexual_identity_baseline )

plot_co_cum_prevalence <- cum_prevalence_poo_co_cc %>%
  filter(
    sexual_identity_baseline %in% c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
    ) %>%
  mutate(
    sexual_identity_baseline = factor(
      sexual_identity_baseline,
      levels = c( "Heterosexual", "Homosexual", "Bisexual" )
      ),
    outcome = as.factor( outcome )
    )

summary( plot_co_cum_prevalence )

# merge data
plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence <- bind_rows(
  plot_co_data_cc %>%
    mutate( type = "annual" ),
  
  plot_co_cum_prevalence %>%
    rename( year = cum_year ) %>%
    mutate( type = "cumulative" )
  ) %>%
  mutate( type = as.factor( type ) )

summary( plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence )

plot_co_single_cohort <- plot_co_ann_cum_prevalence %>%
  filter( cohort_year == 2006 ) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = factor(
      outcome,
      levels = c(
        "depression", "anxiety", "stress_related",
        "antidepressant_use", "anxiolytic_use"
        ),
      labels = c(
        "Depression", "Anxiety Disorders", "Stress-Related Disorders",
        "Antidepressant Use", "Anxiolytic Use"
        )
      ),
    
    type = factor(
      type,
      levels = c( "annual", "cumulative" ),
      labels = c( "Annual", "Cumulative" )
      )
    )

summary( plot_co_single_cohort )
```

###### 4.3.2.2. Diagnosis
```{r}
plot_diag <- plot_co_single_cohort %>%
  filter( outcome %in% c(
    "Depression",
    "Anxiety Disorders",
    "Stress-Related Disorders"
    ) )

plot_diag %>%
  group_by( outcome ) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min( point_estimate ),
    max = max( point_estimate )
  )

p_diag <- ggplot(
  plot_diag,
  
  aes(
    x = year,
    y = point_estimate,
    color = sexual_identity_baseline,
    linetype = type,
    group = interaction( sexual_identity_baseline, type )
    ) 
  ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_color_manual( 
    values = c(
      "Heterosexual" = "#F8766D",
      "Homosexual"   = "#00BFC4",
      "Bisexual"     = "#C77CFF" ) 
    ) +
  
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c( "Annual" = "dotted", 
                "Cumulative" = "solid" )
    ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2019 ),
    breaks = c( seq( 2006, 2015, by = 3 ), 2019 ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.02 ) )
    ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = "Prevalence",
    color = NULL,
    linetype = NULL
    ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ outcome, 
              ncol = 1,
              scales = "free_y" ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    outcome == "Depression" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.6 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.6, 0.15 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ),
    
    outcome == "Anxiety Disorders" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.4, 0.1 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ),
    
    outcome == "Stress-Related Disorders" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.3 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.3, 0.1 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "bottom" ) +
  
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' ) 

p_diag
# ggsave(
#   "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_cum_prevalence_poo_co_diag_2006_cc.svg",
#   plot = p_diag,
#   width = 7,
#   height = 9 
#   )
```

###### 4.3.2.3. Medication
```{r}
plot_med <- plot_co_single_cohort %>%
  filter( outcome %in% c(
    "Antidepressant Use",
    "Anxiolytic Use"
    ) )

plot_med %>%
  group_by( outcome ) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min( point_estimate ),
    max = max( point_estimate )
  )

plot_med$outcome <- factor(
  plot_med$outcome,
  levels = c(
    "Antidepressant Use",
    "Anxiolytic Use",
    " "
    )
  ) # create place holder

plot_med %>%
  filter( outcome == " " )

p_med <- ggplot(
  plot_med,
  
  aes(
    x = year,
    y = point_estimate,
    color = sexual_identity_baseline,
    linetype = type,
    group = interaction( sexual_identity_baseline, type )
    ) 
  ) +
  
  geom_line( linewidth = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point( size = 1.2 ) +
  
  scale_color_manual( 
    values = c(
      "Heterosexual" = "#F8766D",
      "Homosexual"   = "#00BFC4",
      "Bisexual"     = "#C77CFF" ) 
    ) +
  
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c( "Annual" = "dotted", 
                "Cumulative" = "solid" )
    ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c( 2006, 2021 ),
    breaks = c( seq( 2006, 2021, by = 3 ) ),
    expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.07, 0.02 ) )
    ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Calendar Year",
    y = NULL,
    color = NULL,
    linetype = NULL
    ) +
  
  facet_wrap( ~ outcome, 
              ncol = 1,
              scales = "free_y",
              drop = FALSE,
              axes = "all_x" ) +
  
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales( y = list(
    outcome == "Antidepressant Use" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.6 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.6, 0.15 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ),
    
    outcome == "Anxiolytic Use" ~ scale_y_continuous( 
      limits = c( 0, 0.4 ),
      breaks = c( seq( 0, 0.4, 0.1 ) ),
      labels = scales::percent_format( accuracy = 1 ),
      expand = expansion( mult = c( 0.05, 0.02 ) ) ) ) ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    panel.spacing = unit( 2, "lines" ),
    axis.title = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    axis.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 11 ),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "bottom" ) +
  
  coord_capped_cart( left = 'both', bottom = 'both' ) 

p_med
# ggsave(
#   "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_cum_prevalence_poo_co_med_2006_cc.svg",
#   plot = p_med,
#   width = 7,
#   height = 9
#   )
```

###### 4.3.2.4. Merge plot
```{r}
p_prevalence <-
  p_diag +
  plot_spacer() +
  p_med +
  plot_layout(
    widths = c( 1, 0.08, 1 ),
    guides = "collect"
    ) &
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text( family = "Arial", size = 10 ),
    legend.position = "bottom"
    )

p_prevalence
ggsave(
  "results_output/plots_cc/p_ann_cum_prevalence_poo_co_2006_cc.svg",
  plot = p_prevalence,
  width = 12,
  height = 9
)
```
